---
title: "Data-Story-plan"
format: html
---

Data Story:

Start with a visualization breaking down the general healthcare coverage across states (type etc)

"Zoom In" on uninsured rates in the country (maybe by demographic?)
**a finding to include here is that medicaid is the strongest predictor of lower uninsured rates across states

Final Viz of how medicaid cuts will/has affected insurance coverage for people (and uninsurance)
